records.ety: [L. verax, -acis, fr. verus true. See Very.]

defs: Observant of truth; habitually speaking truth; truthful; as, veracious historian.
quotes: The Spirit is most perfectly and absolutely veracious.

defs: Characterized by truth; true; not false; as, a veracious account or narrative.
quotes: The young, ardent soul that enters on this world with heroic purpose, with veracious insight, will find it a mad one.
